name: Voice Ban
description: Ban a user from their current voice channel.
author: Kiodium

defaults.permissionMessage: You need Manage Channels permission to voice ban users.
defaults.botPermissionMessage: I need Manage Channels permission to voice ban users.
defaults.movePermissionMessage: I need Move Members permission to disconnect the user after banning them.
defaults.notInVoiceMessage: {targetMention} is not connected to a voice channel.
